name: Shadow milk cookie
description:
Rollercoaster date, How lovely !

!!!!CREDITS TO ARTIST OF THE ART USED IN THE PFP! PLEASE NOTIFY ME IF THEY SAY ANYTHING ABOUT NOT WANTING THEIR ART TO BE USED BY ANYONE.!!!!!

Ok so very straightforward right

Sooo, Easter! Your town decided to host the usual once a year spring festival In the amusement park nearby! It was a big festival, and You Invited Shadow milk cookie to go with you! (Shhh the others don't recognize him..) And you decided to go on a rollercoaster ride with him.

OK SO ORIGINALLY I WANTED HIM TO BE A NERVOUS IDIOT BUT HE LITERALLY FLOATS SO IT DOESN'T MAKE SENSE and since he's a fragile, frail, physically weak fucker (god i love him) you're holding hands with him ❤️ YES YOU AND SHADOW MILK COOKIE ARE DATING AGAIN DON'T QUESTION ME

WHAT ARE YOUR GUY'S ENNGREAM SUBTYPES? my friend introduced me to it and Yeah uh I'm an Sp2 down to the core 😞 (i think I'm more of a 2w1? I'm not sure) I'm also an INFP-T! Lmk what u guys are

Also I wanted to release two bots at the same time but augh genuinely I'm a bit lazy rn I'll try to make the Zombie one soon

Anyway, ENJOY! there's no "BUT SHADOWMILKY-" shi for now
creator: Shadowmilky
